STOPPING STEAM TURBINE- GENERATOR SET
Page 1 of 11 Turbine start-up procedure
Barring gear start-up procedure
AOP and MOP
 First after logging into the system.
motor
 Click on the drop down list and open Lube oil system.
EOP motor
 Then start AOP or MOP motor.

list

transmitter

 Then put the other oil pump not running in Auto.
 Put EOP Motor also in auto.
 Check the oil pressure in the Lube Oil transmitter to be >2.5 bar.
 Keep the VE (Vapour Extraction) Motor in Auto (it should be running
when any of the Oil motor is running).
 Then start the barring gear motor.
Page 2 of 11
chunks.source_path: D:\기계도면\기계도면\32. 증기터빈 (정석)\제주 VP\전기\19. Operation Manual\GS Jeju operation procedure..pdf

chunks.text:
of the Oil motor is running).
 Then start the barring gear motor.
Page 2 of 11 Important note:-
If turbine is hot and Electrical Power Is shut down for 10 min start Hand
barring.
Hand Barring procedure
 Ensure that the barring gear motor is in Manual mode (as a safety
measure).
 Install the Hand wheel on the barring gear motor.
 Rotate for 5 minutes and halt for 5 minutes (repeat this process until the
power supply is up and normal).
Turbine should be put on barring gear, at-least 24 hours before starting the
steam rolling of the turbine. This ensure free and smooth rolling of the turbine.
Turbine start-up procedure.
 Check lube oil system as instructed in the Barring gear start-up
procedure.
 Check pressure in the Lube Oil transmitter to be >2.5 bar.
 Click on the drop down list and open Governing system.
Page 3 of 11
chunks.source_path: D:\기계도면\기계도면\32. 증기터빈 (정석)\제주 VP\전기\19. Operation Manual\GS Jeju operation procedure..pdf

chunks.text:
>2.5 bar.
 Click on the drop down list and open Governing system.
Page 3 of 11 Control oil
press
ACOP1 and
ACOP2 motor
 Start the ACOP pump and check the Control oil pressure to be >28 bar.
 Not put the other ACOP pump not running in Auto.
Steam rolling:-
 Now click on the drop down menu and open the turbine trip page.

Page 4 of 11
chunks.source_path: D:\기계도면\기계도면\32. 증기터빈 (정석)\제주 VP\전기\19. Operation Manual\GS Jeju operation procedure..pdf

chunks.text:
 Now click on the drop down menu and open the turbine trip page.

Page 4 of 11  Now click on the Trip reset and check all the tripping annunciators are
OK (indication green).
 If Turbine solenoid is green indication, then click on the “SOV RESET”,
then check the SOV RESET” and then check.
 If all the three LP reset conditions are OK (green), then reset the LP.
 Then if all the ESV reset conditions are OK (green), then reset the ESV
and check for the “ESV open Feedback” is ok (green).
 Then check the “Governor Start permissive” conditions is healthy (green)
and then click on governor rest and then click on run command.
 Governor starts the start-up procedure for the turbine and will take the
turbine to the rated Speed of 8220 rpm.
Voltage build-up and TG loading procedure:-
 After Turbine reaching rated speed. Check the Ready for excitation in the
AVR panel.

 Reset the GRP relays in the relay panel. (press and then press 2 times
Page 5 of 11
chunks.source_path: D:\기계도면\기계도면\32. 증기터빈 (정석)\제주 VP\전기\19. Operation Manual\GS Jeju operation procedure..pdf

chunks.text:
et the GRP relays in the relay panel. (press and then press 2 times
Page 5 of 11 
 Reset all the Auxiliary relays in the relay panel.
 Reset the indications in the GRP relay. Press F10 button.

 Check the Auto mode is on then Press the “Excitation ON” button in the
AVR panel.
 After Turbine attains rated Voltage of 6.6KV.
Page 6 of 11 
 Check GCP panel NIS to be in close condition.
Selector 1 Selector 2 Selector 3 Selector 4

 Select the TG breaker in the Selector switch1 (position 1),
 Select the “Live” mode in the Selector Switch2.
 Select the “Auto” mode in the Selector Switch3.
 Then select the Synchro scope “on” in the Selector Switch4.
 After turbine is Synchronized switch on the “PF ON” button in AVR.
Page 7 of 11
chunks.source_path: D:\기계도면\기계도면\32. 증기터빈 (정석)\제주 VP\전기\19. Operation Manual\GS Jeju operation procedure..pdf

chunks.text:
After turbine is Synchronized switch on the “PF ON” button in AVR.
Page 7 of 11  Turbine base load is 2MW and on closing breaker turbine will attain
2MW load.
 Use MW raise/ lower button to adjust the turbine load to the desired
level as the steam availability condition.
 Follow the standard Turbine loading cure to load the turbine accordingly.
During Turbine Operation or running condition.
 Keep monitoring the Lube oil pressure and Lube oil filter DP transmitter,
if DP pressure> 0.6 Bar change the filter and clean for trouble free
operation.
 Keep monitoring the CEP discharge pressure, if the discharge pressure
decreases then the other pump starts automatically.
 If the other pump starts, stop the pump in manual and clean the CEP
suction strainer and make it ready and then keep the standby pump in
auto and ready for operation.
 If there is any decrease in Control oil pressure, check the control oil filter
DP pressure and change the filter if it is > 0.6 bar.
 Press and check the ESV check valve once in a week for proper
functioning of ESV.
 Monitor the Alternator winding temperature, if increases to alarm limits
check the cooling water temperature, pressure and flow are in proper
proportion as per design.
Turbine Stopping procedure
 Gradually decrease the load to 2MW.
Page 8 of 11
chunks.source_path: D:\기계도면\기계도면\32. 증기터빈 (정석)\제주 VP\전기\19. Operation Manual\GS Jeju operation procedure..pdf

chunks.text:
n.
Turbine Stopping procedure
 Gradually decrease the load to 2MW.
Page 8 of 11  Then open the generator breaker.
 Trip the turbine from the turbine trip button.
 Also close the gland sealing system control valve by taking it into manual
and manual command to 0%.
 Open the Wheel chase and Nozzle chest drains.
 Open the Vacuum breaker valve to break the vacuum (Ensure that CEP
pumps are not running).
 After turbine attaining the barring gear RPM.
 Stop the ACOP 1 and 2 and change both the pumps to manual.
 Stop the CEP1 and CEP2 and change both the pumps to manual.
 Turbine should be running in barring gear for at least 24 hours after
turbine is stopped.
General Notes:

IMPORTANT NOTES: 1. Barring gear should keep running for at least 8 hours after turbine trips. Also
ensure that barring gear is running for 8 hours before turbine start-up can be
initiated.
chunks.header: 1. Barring gear should keep running for at least 8 hours after turbine trips. Also
chunks.source_path: D:\기계도면\기계도면\32. 증기터빈 (정석)\제주 VP\전기\19. Operation Manual\GS Jeju operation procedure..pdf

chunks.text:
at barring gear is running for 8 hours before turbine start-up can be
initiated. 2. In case after the turbine trips, the Barring gear motor fails to run due to Power
supply failure, failure of Soft starter /Fuses/Fault in the motor/Over load etc,
then put the barring gear motor power isolator in off condition and turn the
barring gear hand wheel manually until the problem is solved or until the rotor
cools down. At the manual turning process ensure that either AOP or EOP ( DC
motor) is in running condition.
3.If for any reason, TG breaker trips ,turbine is running at rated speed and in
case turbine need to be loaded immediately.
chunks.header: 2. In case after the turbine trips, the Barring gear motor fails to run due to Power

ine is running at rated speed and in
